Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-13-2026 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brendan Crosson appeared via zoom (petitioner).

Mr. Crosson stated that he is requesting for a new probate referee since the one that was assigned to him has retired, and that the decedent had two properties her home and another family home that she owned.

The matter is continued to March 18, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Jan-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brendan Harley Crosson, Petitioner in Pro Per.

Mr. Crosson confirmed that no objections had been filed or received. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 14, 2023, is admitted to probate. Brendan Crosson is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status of filing an inventory and appraisal is set for October 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 21, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
